utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan indicates physical and mental components and provides a combined monthly cost. Although consolidated, it specifies coverage types and cost, so acceptable.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan name given (PrimeHome Premium) and a monthly cost provided; contents not explicitly spelled out but 'home/contents' is implied by category. Considered specified with cost.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan and monthly cost provided.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan description and cost provided.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided pre-discount total, company discount percentage, and final monthly cost. Annual figure is not provided; the phrase 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' suggests both should be present. Since annual breakdown is missing, this item is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each plan in the final coverage plan to the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings and extract its rating. The health plan lists 'PrimeCare Premium (physical) + EliteCare Premium (mental)'. For physical health, 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' has rating 10. For mental health, 'EliteCare Premium Plan' has rating 10. Property coverage selects 'PrimeHome Premium', which corresponds to 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' with rating 10. Travel coverage selects 'PrimeTravel Premium', which corresponds to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' with rating 10. Additional services are 'Adult Children & Personal Liability Support + Bundled Services' which do not directly match any named items in the ground truth enhancement/general services list, so they are not mappable to a specific rating.
